title: PlanBench
description: Evolve a single-file solver independently for each PlanBench task_1 plan-generation prompt in the local full snapshot.
baseline_summary: A placeholder solver that returns no plan for the active PlanBench prompt.

objective_spec.summary_template: Higher exact plan-match rate is better across independently evolved PlanBench prompts.

prompt_context: Edit editable.py only. The entry symbol solve(question: dict) must return the final plan for the active PlanBench prompt. You may return either a list[str] with one action per step or a newline-separated string of actions. Do not use browsing or external network access.
